title: Craftable Spawn Eggs
description: This mod adds craftable spawn eggs.
body:
![CraftableSpawnEggs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd778bb74eaeaa5d25627faecbf173335e841756.png)

Do you want to craft spawn eggs without having to go into Creative Mode then switching back to Survival? Now you can with this mod.

All spawn eggs follow the same recipe format except the item they drop which is needed to craft that specific mob. (Villager and Vindicator are an exception).

(1.0.0)
- Pig (1 raw porkchop)
- Cow (1 raw beef)
- Sheep (1 raw mutton)
- Chicken (1 raw chicken)
- Skeleton (1 bone)
- Zombie (1 rotten flesh)
- Enderman (1 ender pearl)
- Wither (1 nether star)
- Salmon (1 raw salmon)
- Spider (1 string)
- Creeper (1 gunpowder)
- Villager (1 emerald)

(v1.0.1 includes)
- Armadillo (1 armadillo scute)
- Cod (1 raw cod)
- Donkey (1 leather)
- Glow Squid (1 glow ink sac)
- Rabbit (1 raw rabbit)
- Squid (1 ink sac)

(v1.0.2 includes)
- Iron Golem (1 poppy)
- Panda (1 bamboo)
- Blaze (1 blaze rod)
- Elder Guardian (1 prismarine shard)
- Evoker (1 totem of undying)
- Ghast (1 ghast tear)
- Magma Cube (1 magma cream)
- Phantom (1 phantom membrane)

(v1.0.3 includes)
- Witch (1 redstone dust)
- Warden (1 sculk catalyst)
- Vindicator (1 iron axe)
- Shulker (1 shulker shell)
- Turtle (1 seagrass)

![CowSpawnEgg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ace563d77ed4aa1f92018bc93fc16bb2bf5057f.png)
![VillagerSpawnEgg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2b05eed8caa2a1d5d467d25fb6cb45fa0a22f09.png)
